issue.title: AbcvlibController– Some Properties Violate the Java2Kotlin Migration Guide

body.from:
### Summary

### Summary

Both `_isRunning` and `_output` in [`AbcvlibController`](https://github.com/tekkura/sr-android/pull/163/changes#diff-3ca45e1bf592ec5582592836a84968c58fc6e67fc92139baba37e6b48fd21d16) do not follow the [Java2Kotlin Migration Guide](https://github.com/tekkura/sr-android/blob/milestone/java2kotlin/docs/migrations/Java2Kotlin.md).

> Do not bypass JVM accessor clashes by renaming canonical properties to underscore-backed names (for example, `state` → `_state`) when the rename is only used to avoid getter/setter conflicts.

### Current state

```kotlin
private var _isRunning = false
private var _output: Output = Output()
```

### Expected state

```kotlin
private var isRunning = false
private var output: Output = Output()
```
